examples: She threw him out of the house.
She threw out all the expired food.
Don't throw that out! I need it.
The student was thrown out of class.
He was thrown out of the bar.
They threw out the disruptive fans.
Don't throw me out! Give me another chance.
He threw out his old clothes.
example_translate: Не выбрасывай это! Мне это нужно.
Не выгоняй меня! Дай мне ещё один шанс.
throw out.synonyms:
Выбрасывать, избавляться - discard, dispose of, throw away
Выгонять, удалять (кого-либо) - eject, expel, kick out
